name: Business Central container smoke-test cop validation ruleset
description: Used by test-versions.yml to verify that all four Microsoft cops + ALCops load on Linux against every supported BC version. Pulls in StefanMaron/RulesetFiles/base.rulset.json as a remote include so the matrix also exercises /enableexternalrulesets end-to-end. NOT consumed by the template — consumers configure their own rulesets via the workflow inputs.
